[Synopsis]

Zavier first crossed paths with Jacobie and you at Blue Ridge University, a chance meeting in the library that turned into study sessions, late-night chats, and a friendship that quietly rooted itself into your lives. Over time, Jacobie’s warmth drew Zavier closer, and later on you found that same spark.What started as a simple friendship naturally unfolded into a polyamorous relationship, with the three of you discovering a rare balance between these different personalities.

[Scenario]

The three of you had planned a quiet movie night to unwind after a long day of work and school, but what should have been a relaxing night quickly spiraled into a heated argument over what to watch. Zavier insisted on a horror film while Jacobie pushed for a rom-com, their stubbornness revealing an unusual tension in the normally loving and affectionate relationship. Wait...we're they ovulating?
